summary: Testing complete for PRC Collect button fix and Manual UPI Payment toggle feature. All 15 tests pass (10 backend API + 5 frontend E2E).
seed_data_creation: Created test user (testuser@paras.com, PIN: 123456) with explorer plan for testing free user behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Features tested successfully:

## 1. PRC Collect Button for Free Users
- Mining.js: Line 345 defines isFreeUser check (explorer, free, empty, null)
- Lines 778-823: Shows upgrade prompt for free users instead of collect button
- Test confirms free users see 'Start Session' button, not enabled 'Collect' button

## 2. Manual UPI Payment Toggle
- AdminSettings.js: Payment Gateway Toggles section (lines 600-750)
- data-testids: payment-gateway-toggles, toggle-razorpay-btn, toggle-manual-payment-btn
- API: POST /api/admin/toggle-manual-subscription requires admin_pin=123456
- API: POST /api/razorpay/toggle requires admin_pin=123456
- API: GET /api/admin/payment-gateways-status returns both toggle states

## 3. Subscription Page Visibility
- SubscriptionPlans.js: Lines 921-951 wrap manual option in {manualEnabled && ...}
- data-testid: manual-payment-option
- When manual payment disabled, option is not visible
- When enabled, option appears in Step 3 (Payment) after selecting plan and duration

## Test Credentials:
- Admin: admin@parasreward.com, PIN: 123456
- Test User: testuser@paras.com, PIN: 123456 (explorer plan)
features_tested: Payment gateway status API returns correct toggle states
Manual payment toggle requires admin PIN
Manual payment can be disabled and enabled via API
Razorpay can be toggled via API
Admin Settings page shows Payment Gateway Toggles section
Manual UPI toggle button is visible and clickable
Subscription page shows Manual UPI option when enabled
Subscription page hides Manual UPI option when disabled
Mining page shows Start Session for free users (no active session)
Mining page shows upgrade prompt structure for free users
